'''Lialla Tane''' was a member of the [[Naboo Underground]] resistance group established after the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation's]] [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. Her parents had been captured and held prisoner by the Trade Federation. Her father, [[Kyu Tane]], was the [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] [[Minister of Culture/Legends|Minister of Culture]]. Not having the means to rescue them herself, she contacted a group of colleagues in the Naboo Underground movement, who agreed to rescue her parents.

{{Char-stub}}
